zh.lifeSummary: 當Hawise Lutterel於大約1393年出生在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾易爾納姆時，她的父親Andrew Luttrell Jr30歲，母親Joan Taillebois30歲。她於大約1410年與Sir Thomas Belesby在英國英格蘭爾胡頓結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1422年3月24日在她的家鄉享年30歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Hawise Lutterel于大约1393年出生在英国英格兰林可爾史爾易爾納姆时，她的父亲Andrew Luttrell Jr30岁，母亲Joan Taillebois30岁。她于大约1410年与Sir Thomas Belesby在英国英格兰爾胡頓结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。她去世于1422年3月24日在她的家乡享年30岁。

nameMeanings.name: Lutterel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: nickname from Old French lotreor, lotrier ‘otter hunter’.

variants.name: Luttrell
meanings: English and Irish (of Norman origin): from a diminutive of Old French loutre ‘otter’ (from Latin lutra), applied as a nickname for someone thought to resemble an otter, or a metonymic occupational name for someone who hunted otters (for their pelts). Compare Luter and Litteral .

variants.name: Lutter
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Gerhardt, Gerd, Helmut, Horst, Klaus.
German: habitational name from any of several places so called, for example near Hanover.

variants.name: Luter
meanings: from Old French loutre ‘otter’, either used as a nickname, or alternatively as a metonymic occupational name to denote an otter hunter.

nameMeanings.name: Hawise
meanings: This female name (which has been corrupted down to Avice and Avis) is from Hadewisa, formed from the German name Hedvig, same as Edwig, which Wachter translates 'propugnator felicitatis;' say, 'fortunate soldier.'

en.lifeSummary: When Hawise Lutterel was born about 1393, in Irnham, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Andrew Luttrell Jr, was 30 and her mother, Joan Taillebois, was 30. She married Sir Thomas Belesby about 1410, in Hooton, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died on 24 March 1422, in her hometown, at the age of 30.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Hawise Lutterel est née environ 1393, à Irnham, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Andrew Luttrell Jr, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Joan Taillebois, avait 30 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Thomas Belesby environ 1410, à Hooton, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée le 24 mars 1422, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 30 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Hawise Lutterel um 1393 in Irnham, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Andrew Luttrell Jr 30 und ihre Mutter Joan Taillebois 30. Sie hat um 1410 in Hooton, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom Sir Thomas Belesby geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb am 24. März 1422 im Alter von 30 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Hawise Lutterel è nata il circa 1393 nel Irnham, Lincolnshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Andrew Luttrell Jr, aveva 30 anni e sua madre, Joan Taillebois, aveva 30 anni. Lei sposato Sir Thomas Belesby circa 1410, nel Hooton, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì il 24 marzo 1422, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 30 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Hawise Lutterelが約1393年にイギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアイルンハムで生まれた時，父Andrew Luttrell Jrは30歳，母Joan Tailleboisは30歳であった。約1410年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアホーオトンでSir Thomas Belesbyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼女は1422年3月24日に故郷で30歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Hawise Lutterel(이)가 대략 1393년 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 언함에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Andrew Luttrell Jr(은)는 30세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joan Taillebois(은)는 30세였다. 그녀는 대략 1410년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 후턴에서 Sir Thomas Belesby(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1422년 3월 24일 그녀의 고향에서 30세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Hawise Lutterel nasceu aproximadamente 1393, em Irnham, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Andrew Luttrell Jr, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Joan Taillebois, tinha 30 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Thomas Belesby aproximadamente 1410, em Hooton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ela faleceu em 24 de março de 1422, em sua cidade natal, com 30 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hawise Lutterel родилась около 1393 г. в местности ирнам, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Andrew Luttrell Jr было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan Taillebois, 30. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Thomas Belesby около 1410 г. в местности хутон, чешир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла 24 марта 1422 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 30 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Hawise Lutterel nació aproximadamente 1393, en Irnham, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Andrew Luttrell Jr, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Joan Taillebois, tenía 30 años. Se casó con Sir Thomas Belesby aproximadamente 1410, en Hooton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió el 24 de marzo de 1422, en su pueblo, a la edad de 30 años.
